heading: ***EXTREME HEAT WATCH FOR THE CHAMPLAIN, HUDSON, AND LOWER CT VALLEYS, AND IN NH SOUTH OF THE WHITE MOUNTAINS, WEDNESDAY THROUGH FRIDAY***Today
text: Periods of sunshine, mixing with afternoon clouds. Showers and thunderstorms developing in the St. Lawrence midday, spreading southeast this afternoon, especially from I-89 west and south, more scattered northeast. Quite warm. Highs in the 80s. Winds becoming south to southwest 5 to 15 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Periods of clouds, with a good chance of showers, possibly some strong evening thunderstorms. Warm and muggy. Lows in the 60s to low 70s. Winds southwest 5 to 15 mph, becoming west and diminishing to less than 10 mph.

heading: Wednesday
text: Hazy, hot, and humid. Localized, strong afternoon or evening thunderstorms, possibly more numerous northeast. Highs in the upper 80s to mid 90s. Winds light, becoming west near 10 mph.
